# Ritik Chhipa — Portfolio

> Full-Stack Developer, UI/UX Designer, and Mobile App Engineer building premium, scalable digital products. Trusted by 50+ clients worldwide.

## About

Ritik Chhipa is an independent software developer and designer based in India, available globally. He specialises in end-to-end product development — from pixel-perfect UI/UX design and branding to production-grade web and mobile applications. He has worked with founders, startups, and enterprises across the US, UK, Europe, and Asia.

## Services

- Full-Stack Web Development (Next.js, React, Node.js, NestJS)
- Mobile App Development (React Native)
- UI/UX Design & Design Systems
- SaaS Product Development
- Cloud Infrastructure (AWS)
- Blockchain / Web3 Development
- Brand Identity & Visual Design

## Tech Stack

Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
Backend: Node.js, NestJS, Express, REST, GraphQL
Mobile: React Native (iOS & Android)
Database: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
Cloud: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS), Vercel, Supabase
Web3: Solidity, Hardhat, Ethers.js
